finding_cards.finding: CNN (April 23, Tier 2) reported US military developing options including targeting individual Iranian military leaders and 'obstructionists' undermining negotiations; Ahmad Vahidi specifically named on the list. This upgrades the Day 78 T4-only (thedefensenews.com) finding to CNN Tier-2 corroborated. The CNN report appears within the April 23 article on US military plans against Hormuz defenses if ceasefire fails, corroborated by OSINTtechnical and A_M_R_M1 X accounts citing CNN directly. No Vahidi direct named statement on MOU, 5 preconditions, or Xi-framed arrangement confirmed Day 79. Fox News and analyst framing: Vahidi 'deciding whether Tehran resumes fighting or continues talks'; 'even more influential than Ghalibaf'; 'primary person meeting with Iran's new supreme leader.' Vahidi appears willing to risk a US military response to assert Iranian Strait control per Critical Threats. No Aliabadi signal. No Aerospace Force vs Quds Force divergence signal.

sources.name: The War Zone — 'Where Are The Carriers As Of May 11, 2026: 20 Warships Including Two Carriers Enforce Iran Blockade' May 11 2026
19FortyFive — 'USS Harry S. Truman Out of Action for 5 Years' March 2026
Kurdistan24 — 'USS George H.W. Bush CSG to deploy to CENTCOM Region' — sourced

finding_cards.finding: USS George Washington CSG: WESTPAC confirmed. War Zone May 11 confirms GW departed Yokosuka May 10 and is conducting training operations in the Philippine Sea (field carrier landing practice near Iwo Jima). Not CENTCOM-bound. Day 78 open flag closed. CENTCOM carrier posture discrepancy: War Zone May 11 explicitly states 'two carriers enforce Iran blockade' (USS Abraham Lincoln + USS George H.W. Bush). This contradicts the synthesis v3.1 Day 77 baseline of 'THREE carrier strike groups in CENTCOM AOR since April 23 (Lincoln, Bush, CSG-10).' Truman (CSG-10): Departed Norfolk March 31 2026 for CENTCOM deployment; beginning Refueling and Complex Overhaul (RCOH) in June 2026. Truman may have departed the CENTCOM blockade zone by May 11 — either en route home for RCOH or in a different CENTCOM sub-theater. TWO-CSG blockade posture (Lincoln, Bush) appears operative as of May 11. No Eisenhower deployment order. No ROE change. No Dark Eagle or DOE/SOF forward deployment signal.

finding_cards.finding: Knesset dissolution advancing on schedule. Coalition dissolution bill filed May 13; four plenum votes required (preliminary + three readings); preliminary vote expected week of May 18; ultra-Orthodox support confirmed (Degel HaTorah spiritual leader Dov Lando called on members to support dissolution after Netanyahu lacked votes for Haredi draft exemption bill). Election calendar locked to late August–October 27 upon passage. No new Netanyahu-Trump contact documented May 15-16. NEW sub-finding (Day 79): IDF Chief Zamir May 6 statement (Israel Hayom, T3): 'on high alert to return to an intense and broad campaign that will allow us to deepen our achievements and further weaken the Iranian regime'; IDF has 'a further series of targets ready for attack.' This is a harder posture than the mid-April 'every goal achieved' statement in the synthesis v3.1 baseline — indicating operational readiness has been explicitly upgraded to a forward-looking campaign posture, not a retrospective achievement frame. Gaza-track: Israel struck Hamas-affiliated target Haddad May 15 (ToI liveblog headline; 'undermining Trump's Gaza plan' framing) — Gaza-track strike, not Iran nuclear facility. Day 77 US intelligence operational-readying baseline (air munitions movements, completed exercise, intercepted communications) holds without escalation or deescalation at Day 79.

finding_cards.finding: Trump 48h post-summit window CLOSED (May 16 = Day 2). No documented Netanyahu-Trump contact May 14-16. This is the most significant Day 79 PA-gap finding: the 48h window has closed without a Netanyahu rebroadcast. Last documented Netanyahu-Trump contact: May 10 (Sunday, pre-summit). Gap since May 10 = 6 days without documented principal-access channel reset. This is the longest documented gap in the Netanyahu Principal-Penetration mechanism since Day 74 established the pattern. Under Appendix B trigger logic: 'Trump statement holding direction beyond 48h without Netanyahu rebroadcast → Netanyahu Principal-Penetration weakening; Fork B durability ↑.' Window has now closed. Trump post-summit framing (May 15): 'fantastic trade deals' with China; focus on energy, Boeing orders, not Iran settlement. Deal-direction cooling from Xi-delivery peak (May 14 'That's a big statement') toward business framing. Not a reversal; not a deepening. Vahidi targeting: CNN (T2) confirmed (see PROBE-2). If targeting ordered (currently planning option only): PA-gap elimination by force rather than negotiation — new Fork A entry mechanism. No Vahidi direct statement on MOU/5 preconditions. Iran-side ratification gap (Vahidi apex anti-deal) unchanged.

finding_cards.finding: No new Day 79 Iranian capability signal. Day 78 baseline holds: 30 of 33 Hormuz missile sites operational per NYT (Tier 2; -50% discount on US official attribution); now multi-source corroborated by Semafor (T2) May 13 and ToI liveblog entry. Slantchev feigning-weakness confirmed at H across multi-source multi-cycle convergence. New sub-finding (Day 79): IRGC repositioning launcher systems beyond effective range of US Precision Strike Missiles (PSMs) — this deepens the PROBE-14 picture. If Iranian launchers are repositioning beyond PSM range, Israeli and US strike planning faces an extending reach problem: capability reconstitution + range extension = Israeli targeting window under increasing time pressure. No Houthi mass-launch event. No Hezbollah missile readiness signal. No cyber Stage 3 indicator. Two-track Hormuz equilibrium holds.

sources: Synthetic composite from PROBE-2, PROBE-7, PROBE-9, PROBE-10, PROBE-12', PROBE-13, PROBE-14 Day 79 outputs
finding_cards.finding: No single first-mover threshold definitively breached Day 79. Race condition architecture holding with notable developments on two axes. IRANIAN COALITION RUPTURE (BS-1b): no signal; structural opacity holds. TRUMP A1-BINDING (BS-5/BS-14): 48h post-summit window CLOSED without Netanyahu rebroadcast — deal-direction held by absence of reversal; cooling to trade framing; 6-day gap since last Netanyahu-Trump contact. This is the longest Penetration-mechanism dormancy since Day 74 pattern establishment. US principal-state-at-decision: deal-leaning cooling toward trade, not toward hardline. ISRAELI OPERATIONAL GRADUATION (BS-3/BS-14): IDF Chief Zamir May 6 'on high alert to return to intense campaign' adds forward-campaign framing beyond mid-April retrospective. Day 77 US intelligence operational readying (air munitions movements, exercise completed, intercepted communications) unchanged. Knesset dissolution preliminary vote week of May 18 — passage will compress Netanyahu's decision-maker window. WPR-AS-FORCING-FUNCTION (BS-5): 7th vote confirmed 49-50; no 8th vote; Fetterman mechanism operative. STRANGULATION TRANSMISSION (BS-1b/BS-7): Brent mid-band (~$105-107); no Kharg saturation; export stall continuing. STRUCTURAL NOTE: Vahidi targeting CNN-confirmed introduces a new first-mover variable — US may act against the PA-gap rather than waiting for Iranian ratification. This changes the first-mover problem from three-actor (Iran/US/Israel) to four-pathway (Iranian rupture / Trump hardline / Israeli pre-emption / US Vahidi strike). The Vahidi-targeting pathway, if ordered, would simultaneously breach the Iranian-first-mover threshold and the US-action threshold.

Vahidi targeting CNN-confirmed introduces US-initiated PA-gap-elimination pathway. Hajj (~May 24-29) is the next structural forcing function. Architecture now has four first-mover pathways: (1) Iranian coalition rupture (structurally opaque, distant); (2) Trump hardline reversal under Netanyahu reset (Penetration mechanism dormant 6 days); (3) Israeli unilateral pre-emption (most advanced threshold; Knesset dissolution imminent; IDF forward-campaign framing); (4) US Vahidi decapitation (new; CNN-confirmed at planning stage).

The four-pathway architecture is a qualitative addition to the analytical frame, not a probability revision.

calibration_check.assessment: Central thesis holding. Day 79's most material findings: (1) Vahidi targeting CNN-corroborated — a qualitative new Fork A entry mechanism is now T2-confirmed, adding PA-gap-elimination-by-force as the fourth first-mover pathway. This does not break the thesis; it extends the mechanism space. (2) Trump 48h window closed without Netanyahu rebroadcast — the Netanyahu Principal-Penetration mechanism has not activated in 6 days; this is the longest dormancy in the pattern. Positive for Fork B durability, though Trump framing is cooling to trade. (3) CENTCOM posture may have shifted from three-CSG to two-CSG (Truman RCOH rotation) — marginal force reduction, does not change the strategic calculus. The constraint architecture continues to bind: Meta-Regression operative; Hajj is the next focal point; Vahidi apex remains anti-deal; Israeli operational graduation most advanced of the first-mover thresholds.
calibration_check.dominant_uncertainty: Whether Hajj (May 24-29) produces any Iranian-Saudi backchannel signal or a new US-Iran round scheduling announcement. If Hajj passes without signal, Meta-Regression re-entrenches and Fork D' extends into June. The Vahidi targeting operational status (planning vs ordered) is the second dominant uncertainty — if it moves from consideration to order, it is a framework-breaking event.
